description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or  wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron Do not iron on decorationsPay tribute to the fabulous wildcraft with this t-shirt. The short sleeves sit snug on well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps your fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and leather sandals for unparalleled cool.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18& rdquoPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
